summary: Backend API testing completed successfully. All 11 tests passed. Bug Fix #1 (TestResultPage data display) and Bug Fix #2 (duplicate test detection in sync) are both working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Bug Fix #1 verified: TestResultPage.tsx correctly transforms webMetrics to performanceMetrics (lines 335-348)
Bug Fix #2 verified: user.service.ts syncTestResults correctly detects duplicates using URL+timestamp within 1-second window (lines 280-293)
Note: Supervisor config points to /app/backend but actual backend is /app/api - backend was running from previous session. May need config update for proper auto-restart.
seed_data_creation: Multiple test records created during sync endpoint testing (unique URLs with timestamps)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs verified working: auth/login, dashboard/tests (list + single), dashboard/stats, user/tests/sync. Test ID 698fcb298bee1c20be4ba7b6 exists for test@example.com user. Supervisor config needs update - backend dir is /app/api not /app/backend.

sync_endpoint.test_sync_same_url_different_timestamp: PASSED - allows same URL with different time

bug_fix_1.description: TestResultPage should display test data correctly
bug_fix_1.details: Frontend transforms webMetrics to performanceMetrics correctly. API returns webMetrics structure and frontend maps it appropriately.

bug_fix_2.description: Sync endpoint should skip duplicate tests (same URL + timestamp)
bug_fix_2.details: syncTestResults in user.service.ts correctly checks for existing tests with same URL and timestamp within 1-second window. Duplicate requests return skippedCount=1, syncedCount=0.
